title: Wrong behaviour of shift operators
body:
Shift operations on signed values returns wrong result in some cases. According to section 4.1.12 and 4.5.1 оf standard result must be signed for this code (signed integer argument with no restrictions by remainder of the expression):

```
    module test;
    initial
    begin
        $display((-1) << 1);
        $display((-1) <<< 1);
    end
    endmodule
```

Output under Icarus Verilog 0.9.7:

```
14
14
```

Output under ncverlog:

```
-2
-2
```
